description: 安装compton 修改配置文件 compton的配置文件在 /.config/compton.conf 因为有些窗口的阴影有时候会变的很奇怪,大概你有可能需要修改一下,附上我的: 关闭xfce4自带的合成器 设置管理器 窗口管理器微调 合成器 启动compton 前台运行 后台运行 开机自启动 修改 /.xprofi

post.title: 解决xfce4画面撕裂
post.bodyHtml:
安装compton

1sudo apt install compton

修改配置文件

compton的配置文件在~/.config/compton.conf
因为有些窗口的阴影有时候会变的很奇怪,大概你有可能需要修改一下,附上我的:

1#################################2#3# Backend4#5#################################6 7# Backend to use: "xrender" or "glx".8# GLX backend is typically much faster but depends on a sane driver.9backend = "glx";10 11#################################12#13# GLX backend14#15#################################16 17glx-no-stencil = true;18 19# GLX backend: Copy unmodified regions from front buffer instead of redrawing them all.20# My tests with nvidia-drivers show a 10% decrease in performance when the whole screen is modified,21# but a 20% increase when only 1/4 is.22# My tests on nouveau show terrible slowdown.23# Useful with --glx-swap-method, as well.24glx-copy-from-front = false;25 26# GLX backend: Use MESA_copy_sub_buffer to do partial screen update.27# My tests on nouveau shows a 200% performance boost when only 1/4 of the screen is updated.28# May break VSync and is not available on some drivers.29# Overrides --glx-copy-from-front.30# glx-use-copysubbuffermesa = true;31 32# GLX backend: Avoid rebinding pixmap on window damage.33# Probably could improve performance on rapid window content changes, but is known to break things on some drivers (LLVMpipe).34# Recommended if it works.35# glx-no-rebind-pixmap = true;36 37 38# GLX backend: GLX buffer swap method we assume.39# Could be undefined (0), copy (1), exchange (2), 3-6, or buffer-age (-1).40# undefined is the slowest and the safest, and the default value.41# copy is fastest, but may fail on some drivers,42# 2-6 are gradually slower but safer (6 is still faster than 0).43# Usually, double buffer means 2, triple buffer means 3.44# buffer-age means auto-detect using GLX_EXT_buffer_age, supported by some drivers.45# Useless with --glx-use-copysubbuffermesa.46# Partially breaks --resize-damage.47# Defaults to undefined.48glx-swap-method = "undefined";49 50#################################51#52# Shadows53#54#################################55 56# Enabled client-side shadows on windows.57shadow = true;58# Don't draw shadows on DND windows.59no-dnd-shadow = true;60# Avoid drawing shadows on dock/panel windows.61no-dock-shadow = true;62# Zero the part of the shadow's mask behind the window. Fix some weirdness with ARGB windows.63#clear-shadow = true;64# The blur radius for shadows. (default 12)65shadow-radius = 5;66# The left offset for shadows. (default -15)67shadow-offset-x = -5;68# The top offset for shadows. (default -15)69shadow-offset-y = -5;70# The translucency for shadows. (default .75)71shadow-opacity = 0.5;72 73# Set if you want different colour shadows74# shadow-red = 0.0;75# shadow-green = 0.0;76# shadow-blue = 0.0;77 78# The shadow exclude options are helpful if you have shadows enabled. 79#Due to the way compton draws its shadows, certain applications will have visual glitches80 81# (most applications are fine, only apps that do weird things with xshapes or argb are affected).82 83# This list includes all the affected apps I found in my testing. 84#The "! name~=''" part excludes shadows on any "Unknown" windows, this prevents a visual glitch with the XFWM alt tab switcher.85#此处加入排除阴影的程序名字86shadow-exclude = [87    "! name~=''",88    "name = 'Notification'",89    "name = 'Plank'",90    "name = 'Docky'",91    "name = 'Kupfer'",92    "name = 'xfce4-notifyd'",93    "name *= 'VLC'",94    "name *= 'compton'",95    "name *= 'gedit'",96    "name *= 'Archive Manager'",97#    "name *= 'Chromium'",98#    "name *= 'Chrome'",99#    "name *= 'Firefox'",100    "class_g = 'Conky'",101    "class_g = 'Kupfer'",102    "class_g = 'Synapse'",103    "class_g ?= 'Notify-osd'",104    "class_g ?= 'Cairo-dock'",105    "class_g ?= 'Xfce4-notifyd'",106    "class_g ?= 'Xfce4-power-manager'"107];108# Avoid drawing shadow on all shaped windows (see also: --detect-rounded-corners)109shadow-ignore-shaped = false;110 111#################################112#113# Opacity114#115#################################116 117#################################118#119# Fading120#121#################################122 123# Fade windows during opacity changes.124fading = true;125# The time between steps in a fade in milliseconds. (default 10).126fade-delta = 4;127# Opacity change between steps while fading in. (default 0.028).128#fade-in-step = 0.03;129# Opacity change between steps while fading out. (default 0.03).130#fade-out-step = 0.03;131# Fade windows in/out when opening/closing132#no-fading-openclose = true;133 134# Specify a list of conditions of windows that should not be faded.135#fade-exclude = [ ];136fade-exclude = [ ];137 138#################################139#140# Other141#142#################################143 144# Try to detect WM windows and mark them as active.145mark-wmwin-focused = true;146# Mark all non-WM but override-redirect windows active (e.g. menus).147mark-ovredir-focused = true;148# Use EWMH _NET_WM_ACTIVE_WINDOW to determine which window is focused instead of using FocusIn/Out events.149# Usually more reliable but depends on a EWMH-compliant WM.150use-ewmh-active-win = true;151# Detect rounded corners and treat them as rectangular when --shadow-ignore-shaped is on.152detect-rounded-corners = true;153 154# Detect _NET_WM_OPACITY on client windows, useful for window managers not passing _NET_WM_OPACITY of client windows to frame windows.155# This prevents opacity being ignored for some apps.156# For example without this enabled my xfce4-notifyd is 100% opacity no matter what.157#detect-client-opacity = true;158 159# Specify refresh rate of the screen.160# If not specified or 0, compton will try detecting this with X RandR extension.161refresh-rate = 0;162 163# Set VSync method. VSync methods currently available:164# none: No VSync165# drm: VSync with DRM_IOCTL_WAIT_VBLANK. May only work on some drivers.166# opengl: Try to VSync with SGI_video_sync OpenGL extension. Only work on some drivers.167# opengl-oml: Try to VSync with OML_sync_control OpenGL extension. Only work on some drivers.168 169# opengl-swc: Try to VSync with SGI_swap_control OpenGL extension. Only work on some drivers. 170#Works only with GLX backend. Known to be most effective on many drivers. 171#Does not actually control paint timing, only buffer swap is affected, 172#so it doesn’t have the effect of --sw-opti unlike other methods. Experimental.173 174# opengl-mswc: Try to VSync with MESA_swap_control OpenGL extension. Basically the same as opengl-swc above, except the extension we use.175# (Note some VSync methods may not be enabled at compile time.)176vsync = "opengl-swc";177 178# Enable DBE painting mode, intended to use with VSync to (hopefully) eliminate tearing.179# Reported to have no effect, though.180dbe = false;181# Painting on X Composite overlay window. Recommended.182paint-on-overlay = true;183 184# Limit compton to repaint at most once every 1 / refresh_rate second to boost performance.185# This should not be used with --vsync drm/opengl/opengl-oml as they essentially does --sw-opti's job already,186# unless you wish to specify a lower refresh rate than the actual value.187sw-opti = false;188 189# Unredirect all windows if a full-screen opaque window is detected, to maximize performance for full-screen windows, like games.190# Known to cause flickering when redirecting/unredirecting windows.191# paint-on-overlay may make the flickering less obvious.192unredir-if-possible = false;193 194 195# Specify a list of conditions of windows that should always be considered focused.196focus-exclude = [ ];197 198# Use WM_TRANSIENT_FOR to group windows, and consider windows in the same group focused at the same time.199detect-transient = true;200# Use WM_CLIENT_LEADER to group windows, and consider windows in the same group focused at the same time.201# WM_TRANSIENT_FOR has higher priority if --detect-transient is enabled, too.202detect-client-leader = true;203 204#################################205#206# Window type settings207#208#################################209 210wintypes:211{212    tooltip =213    {214        # fade: Fade the particular type of windows.215        fade = true;216        # shadow: Give those windows shadow217        shadow = false;218        # opacity: Default opacity for the type of windows.219        opacity = 0.85;220        # focus: Whether to always consider windows of this type focused.221        focus = true;222    };223};

关闭xfce4自带的合成器

设置管理器->窗口管理器微调->合成器

启动compton

前台运行

1compton

后台运行

1compton -b

开机自启动

修改~/.xprofile文件
将compton -b直接加到新的一行就行了
